subject: Accounting
title: What a Balance Sheet Shows
description: A fast breakdown of What a Balance Sheet Shows for builders.

hook.text: A balance sheet is a snapshot of a company's financial health at one exact moment in time.

buildup.text: It lists everything the company owns, everything it owes, and what's left for owners.

discovery.text: The two sides always balance: assets on one side, liabilities plus equity on the other.

twist.text: A company can look healthy on the balance sheet today and be insolvent next month.

climax.text: Investors read balance sheets to judge stability before committing a single dollar.

punchline.text: It's a financial selfie. One moment, frozen.

quiz.question: What does a balance sheet represent?
options: A snapshot at one point in time
